generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. A solitary old anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat wearing tattered grey robes, holding a lantern with a glowing firefly inside. He stands atop a cold, foggy mountain peak under a dark moon. Meaning: Introspection, seeking truth, and the extreme isolation required for survival in the deep, undisturbed primeval mountains.
